task: T2 #140 — thumbnail specs for 3 lane samples (movies / companion / explainer)
note: Lane samples use their own brand systems distinct from DAVID channel. Each spec: 1280×720, JPEG, both A and B variants.

samples.title: Warehouse Signal

brand.lighting: Industrial 4800K window key, deep cool shadow, warehouse depth

title_zone.note: Title left 54%; Amara's face in right 46%; warehouse window behind

actor_crop.notes: Chest-up from peak-frame; side-lit; no full reveal of face if tension beat

samples.imagine_prompt: YouTube thumbnail 1280×720, cinematic thriller tone, high contrast readable at small size. Base from warehouse industrial peak frame — @Set-Warehouse-Industrial-001, deep cool shadow, industrial window key 4800K. LEFT THIRD: bold title-safe negative space, white title 'WAREHOUSE SIGNAL', yellow accent subtitle 'Who's really watching?'. RIGHT TWO-THIRDS: synthetic actress Amara-001 (Amara Singh), 30-year-old synthetic British-Asian female, chest-up, dramatic side lit, tense expression, dark warehouse depth behind. No real person likeness, no celebrity resemblance, invented face. Deep blue-grey industrial palette; PG-13 tension, no gore. Genre badge lower-left: THRILLER · STUDIO SAMPLE. STUDIO wordmark top-left. SFW.
design_notes: Use candidate_peak_frame.jpg as base (shot 06_peak, 42.6s — peak tension beat)
Keep Amara's eyes in right two-thirds; title text in left title-safe zone
No blood, no explicit violence — PG-13 thriller tension only

b.label: B — genre / keyword
b.imagine_prompt: YouTube thumbnail 1280×720, cinematic thriller, crisp text left third. White bold title 'THRILLER SAMPLE', subtitle 'STUDIO movies lane — synthetic talent'. Warehouse industrial set background, @Set-Warehouse-Industrial-001, dark and moody. Synthetic actress Amara-001, chest-up right two-thirds, cool window side-key. SFW PG-13. STUDIO wordmark. No real person likeness.

samples.ab_test_note: A variant for engagement/mystery; B variant for demo/showcase context (client deliverable). Compare CTR after 48h.

samples.title: Sage SFW Check-In

brand.lighting: Soft warm daylight through window, linen sofa, modern apartment, lifestyle casual

title_zone.note: Warm light background; companion face right 55%; calm text left 45%

actor_crop.notes: Chest-up from apartment soft-light take; warm eye-line to camera; fully clothed smart-casual

samples.imagine_prompt: YouTube thumbnail 1280×720, warm lifestyle tone, inviting and calm, high readability. LEFT 45%: title-safe negative space on warm cream/linen bg — dark text 'GLAD YOU'RE HERE', subtitle 'A check-in for your week'. RIGHT 55%: SageGFE-001 — synthetic female companion, 26yo, intellectual energy, warm eye-line to camera, smart-casual fully clothed (fitted jumper or blouse), soft window daylight from left, modern apartment linen sofa behind. Warm, friendly, no suggestive framing, PG mandatory. Green accent badge lower-left: SFW COMPANION · STUDIO SAMPLE. STUDIO wordmark top-left. No real person likeness, no celebrity resemblance, invented face. Soft warm palette — cream, linen, sage green accents.
design_notes: Warm pale background rather than dark — contrast with DAVID's deep palette
No bedroom staging, no suggestive angle, no close-crop on body
Fully clothed in frame: jumper, blouse, or equivalent smart-casual
SFW badge green accent to signal content rating clearly
For client demo: B variant shows 'STUDIO SAMPLE' prominently

b.label: B — format / keyword
b.imagine_prompt: YouTube thumbnail 1280×720, warm lifestyle. Left third: dark text 'COMPANION CHECK-IN', subtitle 'Synthetic SFW · STUDIO sample'. Right two-thirds: SageGFE-001 synthetic companion, warm apartment set, fully clothed, friendly eye-line, PG. Green badge. STUDIO wordmark. No real person likeness.

samples.ab_test_note: A for viewer-first emotional hook; B for platform/demo context where format signal matters more. Companion YELLOW must re-gate GREEN before any social publish — thumbnail variants cleared for pre-publish asset preparation only.

samples.title: FlowDesk Explainer — Julian-001

brand.lighting: Cool clinical 5600K key on neutral grey seamless; product-trust grade; no warm amber

plates.actor_note: Julian-001: navy blazer, light blue Oxford shirt, no tie, dark chinos; neutral grey seamless behind

title_zone.note: Left 56% for title + product name; Julian right 44% presenting to camera

actor_crop.notes: Chest-up, professional presenter pose, confident eye-line to camera

product_zone.note: Optional: FlowDesk UI mockup lower-left below title, small scale (approx 200×120px)

samples.imagine_prompt: YouTube thumbnail 1280×720, clean product-trust tone, corporate-cool, high contrast. LEFT 56%: title-safe space on near-black bg #0F1219 — bold white title 'YOUR FLOW FIXED', blue accent product name 'FlowDesk', subtitle '30 seconds. See how it works.'. RIGHT 44%: Julian-001 — synthetic male presenter, 31yo, Julian Cross, navy blazer over light blue Oxford, no tie, dark chinos, professional commercial look, confident neutral eye-line to camera, @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001 — neutral grey seamless behind, @Style-Cool-Clinical-001 — 5600K cool clinical key. No real person likeness, no celebrity resemblance, invented face. Cool blue accent #4A9EFF on badge: EXPLAINER AD · STUDIO SAMPLE. STUDIO wordmark top-left. SFW PG.
design_notes: Cool clinical palette — distinct from DAVID warm amber and companion warm cream
Product name 'FlowDesk' in blue accent — signals product explainer format
No real product UI needed — title + badge communicates format
Gate 0 GREEN for this slug — cleared for pre-publish asset prep and client demo
AI disclosure must appear in upload description at any real publish

b.label: B — product / keyword
b.imagine_prompt: YouTube thumbnail 1280×720, product-trust blue-dark. Left: 'FLOWDESK EXPLAINED', subtitle 'Synthetic presenter demo · STUDIO'. Right: Julian-001 navy blazer, neutral grey seamless, 5600K cool key. Blue accent #4A9EFF. STUDIO wordmark. No real person likeness. SFW.

samples.ab_test_note: A for general social reach (benefit-first); B for client/platform demo where format signal matters. Both cleared for asset prep — verify AI disclosure surface before any social publish.
